label: Stat part (age offset)
description: Adds an offset to the stat determined by a curve evaluated against the pawn's age.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping age to the stat offset.

useBiologicalYears.label: Use biological years
useBiologicalYears.description: If true, biological age is used instead of chronological age.

humanlikeOnly.label: Humanlike only
humanlikeOnly.description: If true, this part only applies to humanlike pawns.
